description: Schema for project metadata extraction output.

Rationale.description: Concise explanation of extraction choices, null assignments, and date logic path.

ProjectName.description: Project-centric name, sanitized to remove client identifiers. Null only when no usable project facts exist.

ClientEntityName.description: Explicit client entity name when available; otherwise null.

ClientPseudonym.description: Anonymous client pseudonym only when strongly derivable; otherwise null.

ClientEntityAdditionalInformation.description: Additional explicit facts about the client entity. Must be null when ClientEntityName is null.

StartDate.description: Project start date in YYYY-MM-DD, explicit or inferred from partial data.

EndDate.description: Project end date in YYYY-MM-DD, explicit, inferred, calculated, or null when ongoing logic requires.

Industry.description: Single industry selected from the provided list, or null when evidence is ambiguous.

Address.description: Project-site address fields with stable key presence.

Street.description: Street line of the project-site address, if explicitly present.

City.description: City of the project-site address, if explicitly present.

PostalCode.description: Postal code of the project-site address, if explicitly present.

Country.description: Country of the project-site address, if explicitly present.

IsOngoing.description: True only when explicit ongoing signals or date logic indicate the project is ongoing.
